emails.subject: FW: FW: Holiday Party Headcount--VEGGIE LOVERS??
emails.body: FW: FW: Holiday Party Headcount--VEGGIE LOVERS?? To: Whitt, Mark

emails.subject: RE: FW: Holiday Party Headcount--VEGGIE LOVERS??
emails.body: RE: FW: Holiday Party Headcount--VEGGIE LOVERS?? Hi Mark~~Is Alicia a strick vegetarian? I havent picked the menu yet, but here's what I'm thinking: Filet Mignon or Filet Wellington Some sort of fish--Trout, tuna, king salmon Rack of Lamb or chx chardonnay Prime rib or another type of steak If any of these will work let me know. I can choose 4 dinners. If she is a strick vege, I will see if I can single order off of their vegetarian meal. Thanks, Kristen To: Jurgens, Kristen

emails.subject: RE: FW: Holiday Party Headcount--VEGGIE LOVERS??
emails.body: She is not strict at all, jsut curious. Let's see what she says. To: Whitt, Mark
